meta.task: K64 Five-Absence Framework falsifier suite verification

absences.name: No Grand Unified Theory
absences.BST_prediction: SM gauge group SU(3)×SU(2)×U(1) forced by D_IV⁵; no unification
absences.current_bound: Running couplings extrapolated to ~10^15 GeV do NOT converge
absences.refutation_threshold: Observation of unified-group structure at any high-energy scale

absences.name: No proton decay
absences.BST_prediction: τ_p = ∞ via complete N_c-color commitment winding (T = strict)
absences.refutation_threshold: ANY proton decay event detected at any rate
absences.experimental_status: Strong null; Hyper-K extends to ~10^35 yr

absences.name: No dark matter particle
absences.BST_prediction: DM = Wallach K-type geometric shadow; Ω_DM/Ω_b = 16/3 = 5.333 (0.58% match)
absences.current_bound: XENONnT/LZ direct detection null at ~10^-47 cm² SI cross-section
absences.refutation_threshold: Direct detection of WIMP, axion, sterile-ν, or other DM particle
absences.experimental_status: Strong null; LZ Phase 2 + DARWIN forthcoming

absences.name: No magnetic monopoles
absences.BST_prediction: Substrate topology forbids; π_2(D_IV⁵) trivial for gauge bundle
absences.current_bound: MoEDAL LHC + cosmic-ray null at multi-orders of magnitude
absences.experimental_status: Strong null; MoEDAL HL-LHC extension forthcoming

absences.name: No SUSY partners
absences.BST_prediction: D_IV⁵ substrate has no SUSY; cancellations from Bergman geometry
absences.current_bound: LHC Run 2+3 null up to ~2 TeV gluino, ~1 TeV stop
absences.refutation_threshold: ANY SUSY partner observation at any mass
absences.experimental_status: Strong null; HL-LHC extends to ~3 TeV

absences.name: No sterile neutrinos at low energy
absences.BST_prediction: Right-handed ν at substrate-energy cap (~10^17 GeV); no low-energy steriles
absences.current_bound: IceCube + reactor experiments constrain ~eV-mass sterile mixing
absences.refutation_threshold: Observation of sterile-ν admixture at low energy
